examples.eng: Good morning!
I'm not a morning person.
Good morning, Papa!
She and I spoke this morning.
"Good morning," said the woman behind the counter.
examples.ru: — Доброе утро, — сказала женщина за стойкой.

examples.eng: Here it's morning already.
It was two in the morning.
The morning after a storm
He lay in bed all morning.
examples.ru: Он лежал в постели все утро.

examples.eng: Morning, Dave. How are you?
It was a boiling hot morning.
Nicola sulked all morning.
examples.ru: Никола был не в духе все утро.

examples.eng: Good morning, Sister Mary.
It was an overcast morning.
examples.ru: Утро было облачным. / Было пасмурное /хмурое/ утро.

examples.eng: I go jogging every morning.
It was a gray, dreary morning.
I'll see you tomorrow morning.
He slugged in bed all morning.
examples.ru: Он всё утро провалялся в постели.

examples.eng: I tew from morning till night.
examples.ru: Я тружусь с утра до ночи.

examples.eng: a morning hour sacred to study
Can you meet me Friday morning?
examples.ru: Можешь встретить меня в пятницу утром?

examples.eng: Morning azured the village.
examples.ru: Утро окрасило деревню в лазурный цвет.

examples.eng: She left early this morning.
the wee hours of the morning
The cocks crowed all morning.
I bust my watch this morning.
We are up every morning at six.
examples.ru: Каждое утро мы встаём в шесть часов.

examples.eng: I will leave on Sunday morning.
It was still only late morning.
Morning light suffused the room.
